query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `royalty_payments` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`projectId` int NOT NULL,
	`source` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`sourceType` enum('streaming','download','sync_license','performance','mechanical','merch','other') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'streaming',
	`grossAmount` decimal(12,2) NOT NULL,
	`netAmount` decimal(12,2) NOT NULL,
	`currency` varchar(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'USD',
	`periodStart` timestamp,
	`periodEnd` timestamp,
	`statementRef` varchar(255),
	`notes` text,
	`recordedBy` int NOT NULL,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `royalty_payments_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	FOREIGN KEY (`projectId`) REFERENCES `royalty_projects`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
	FOREIGN KEY (`recordedBy`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`)
);

	`sourceType` enum('streaming','download','sync_license','performance','mechanical','merch','other') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'streaming',
	`grossAmount` decimal(12,2) NOT NULL,

	`currency` varchar(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'USD',
	`periodStart` timestamp,
	`periodEnd` timestamp,
	`statementRef` varchar(255),
	`notes` text,
	`recordedBy` int NOT NULL,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `royalty_payments_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	FOREIGN KEY (`projectId`) REFERENCES `royalty_projects`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
	FOREIGN KEY (`recordedBy`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`)
);
